name: racesow-web
description: Node.js API + frontend that hosts the race database on PostgreSQL

scripts.migrate:create: node-pg-migrate create -m migrations -j sql --migration-filename-format utc -t pgmigrations

//: better-sqlite3 is used ONLY by the one-time migrate-sqlite-to-pg.js, but stays a runtime dependency because that tool runs inside the production image (which installs with --omit=dev). pg is the live driver. node-pg-migrate runs the schema migrations at startup (see web/db.js openDatabase and web/migrations/).
